description_long: This train station features a sprawling, low-profile structure with a predominantly flat, dark roof and a series of interconnected rectangular buildings. The exterior walls are mostly light-colored, with some sections highlighted in pastel hues such as pink and blue, suggesting different functional areas or entrances. The roofline is varied, with a few raised sections and what appears to be a small rooftop structure, possibly for utilities or ventilation. There are several protruding elements along the perimeter, which may represent entrances, loading bays, or auxiliary rooms. The overall footprint is irregular, with the main building mass extending lengthwise and a few smaller annexes attached. The station appears to be designed for high capacity, with broad surfaces and multiple access points, typical of urban train stations.
description: A large, low-rise train station with a flat dark roof, light-colored walls, and several pastel-accented sections, featuring an irregular, elongated footprint and multiple annexes.
description_view_0: From this angle, the station's elongated shape and the main roof area are most visible, with pastel accents and annexes along the front edge.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the depth of the building and shows the raised rooftop structure and a detached rectangular element nearby.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the long, straight edge of the station, with a visible black cylindrical structure and minimal pastel accents.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the station's irregular footprint, with several annexes and pastel-colored sections more clearly visible along the side.
attribute_platform_canopies: None visible; the roof is flat and continuous with no distinct canopies or shelters over platforms.
attribute_station_signage: None visible; there are no discernible signs or station name boards in any view.
attribute_ticket_vending_machines: None visible; no ticket vending machines are apparent in any of the images.
attribute_railway_tracks: None visible; there are no railway tracks shown adjacent to or within the station structure.
